name: qa-agent
description: Codex plugin for running safe website QA with the QaAgent Playwright framework.

interface.shortDescription: Run safe website QA from Codex.
interface.longDescription: QA Agent helps Codex run authenticated website checks with Playwright, capture screenshots, inspect modules, watch console/network health, and generate local QA reports without committing artifacts or secrets.
defaultPrompt: Run full QA on this website
Check login and all modules safely
Generate a QA report with screenshots
